message:
feat(codegen): Add __annotations__ and __flags__ to class metadata

Add CPython-compatible class attributes to generated structs:
- __annotations__: Empty dict for Python type annotations
- __flags__: Type flags (0 for now) for Py_TPFLAGS compatibility

These attributes are required for Python code that accesses
class metadata like C.__annotations__ or C.__flags__.

Added to all 3 class generation locations:
- Regular class structs (line ~1038)
- Nested generic class structs (line ~2122)
- Generic class return structs (line ~2173)
